job_title: Software Engineer - Automation Tools and Infrastructure
job_nlp_title: Software Engineer - Automation Tools and Infrastructure
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Electrical and Controls Engineering, Automation Engineer
core_skills: HIL Test Frameworks, SIL Test Frameworks, Object-oriented programming, Python, C++
skill_match_scores: HIL Test Frameworks:0.5, SIL Test Frameworks:0.5, Object-oriented programming:1.0, Python:1.0, C++:0.0
must_have_quals: BS in relevant engineering discipline and 1+ years of relevant work experience, HIL and/or SIL Test Frameworks, Object-oriented programming experience (Python or C++ preferred), Experience building cross-platform software with source control (Git), Strong interpersonal and communication skills
preferred_quals: CI and build systems (e.g. Bamboo, Buildkite, etc.), Python libraries (e.g. pybind, pytest, pandas, python-can, plotly, matplotlib, etc.), Communication protocols (e.g. CAN, LIN, pub/sub), ClickHouse, OpenSearch, Grafana, Databricks, etc, Databases and Observability Platforms
core_responsibilities: Develop software for an automated validation framework, supporting continuous integration (CI) via smoke, sanity, nightly, weekly pipelines, Research, design, develop, rollout, and maintain software tools and test framework for development and validation, Integrate tester software systems with server infrastructure, including networking (CAN, wifi, cellular, WIFI, NFC, etc), hardware instruments (DAQs, PSUs), protocol-level simulator/spoofer hardware, etc, Propose tool and/or feature ideas to the team to improve processes
job_summary: Zoox is developing the first ground-up, fully autonomous vehicle fleet and is seeking a Software Engineer to join their Firmware Tools team. In this role, you will write software to integrate tools for automated firmware prototyping, development, testing, and integration.
